remarks: Welcome to The Lodge! Prepare to be enchanted as you open the antique front door of this unique country treasure that skillfully combines the character of its ca.1855 origins w/the favored amenities & easy one level design for how we want to live today. Historic beginnings are beautifully embodied in the hardwood floors, cathedral ceilings, stone fireplace, wood paneling & casement windows ... while the 2-modern baths and unrivaled chef's EIK surpass today's desired amenities. Both the roomy LR & lg formal DR have cathedral ceilings w/high window at the ceiling peak; LR offers stone fpl while DR has wood beams+2-corner cabinets. Skylit FR add'n has triple aspect windows & cleverly designed wall between LR & FR has glass panels for sharing natural light. Custom crafted EIK is perfection for the serious home chef w/splendid La Cornue range, abundant custom cabinetry & storage, soap stone countertops, dbl farm sink, fine appliances+cleverly designed casual dining area w/benches & storage. Lg, bright Primary BR has room to curl up w/a book+ space for desk or TV stand. PBR, 2-add'l BRs & 2-baths w/wainscotting add so much charm ... 1 bath has clawfoot tub & one a River rock WI shower. Secondary front entry opens to fabulous mud/laundry filled w/charm- feature sheet tells all. Detached barn/garage/studio, woodshed, patio, rolling treed prop w/stone walls & glorious plantings add finishing touch to this pvtly set N. Stamford property convenient to Pkwy+shops. A unique opportunity
